Trust The Computer, In Paranoia, you play a Toubleshooter in ser= Vice to The Computer. You are The Computer's trusted agent 
How did't get to be a Troubleshooter? You turned in a friend for treason, He was ‘executed for betraying The Computer. The ‘Computer rewarded you for your loyalty 
What is a Troubleshooter supposed to do? Your jb isto root outall traitors and execute them, In other words, to find trouble... and then to shoot I 
What's a “traitor?” 
A traitor is an evil and malevolent human ‘who has betrayed his friend The Computer and seeks to destroy The Computer, humanity, ‘Alpha Complex and life as we know it. Titors must be unmasked and destroyed, ‘All mutants are traitors. They are genetical- ly imperfect. They have no place in utopia ‘They must be eliminated.
